messages.content: Red a battery for my Roamer does the one I’m looking at fit
To assist you better, could you please provide the exact model year of your Roamer? This will help me confirm the correct battery options for you.
It sure. I bought it new about 5 yrs ago

The Roamer 2.0 typically uses a 48V battery. However, to provide the exact battery part number and confirm compatibility, I recommend checking the battery selector tool on our website. You can find it here: 🔗 https://rambobikes.com/pages/battery-selector. This will help you identify the correct battery for your specific Roamer model.

To help you find the right battery, could you please check the serial number on your Roamer? It's usually located on the frame below the battery. This will help us identify the exact model and year, ensuring you get the correct battery.
Great! Once you have the serial number, please share it with me, and I'll help you find the right battery for your Roamer.
